item.name: REG-CR-NEG-INVALID-NAME — Create with non-DNS-safe name (uppercase / underscore) → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT, no Operation
REG-CR-NEG-PROJECT-NOTFOUND — Create with unknown projectId → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT ("project ... not found")
REG-CR-CONF-ALREADY-EXISTS — Create duplicate (project_id,name) → 409 ALREADY_EXISTS (sync) or async op-error

item.name: REG-CR-NEG-MISSING-NAME — Create with no name field → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT (name required)
REG-GET-NEG-MALFORMED-ID — Get not-an-id → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT ("invalid resource id")
REG-GET-NEG-NOTFOUND — Get reg-DOESNOTEXIST00000 → 404 NOT_FOUND (existence-hidden, no deny_reasons)
REG-LST-CRUD-OK — List registries (project-scope) → array, contains created regId (poll-retry on grant-latency)

exec: pm.test('list contains created regId', () => pm.expect(found, 'regId '+target+' in list').to.be.true);

item.name: REG-LST-NEG-BAD-TOKEN — List with garbage page_token → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT
REG-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE — List page_size boundary — 0 → default, 1000 → max ok (both 200)
REG-LST-AZ-NONMEMBER-EMPTY — List over non-member project → 200 array, does not leak own regId

exec: pm.test('no cross-tenant leak of own regId', () => pm.expect(regs.some(r => r.id === pm.environment.get('regId'))).to.eql(false));

item.name: REG-LST-FILTER-NAME-OK — List filter=name="team-images-{{runId}}" → 200, returned registries all match the filtered name

exec: pm.test('filter=name returns only matching registries (grant-latency: array may be empty)', () => regs.forEach(r => pm.expect(r.name, JSON.stringify(r)).to.eql(target)));

item.name: REG-LSTREPO-CRUD-OK — ListRepositories for registry → 200 repositories[] array
REG-LSTREPO-NEG-BAD-TOKEN — ListRepositories with garbage page_token → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT
REG-LSTREPO-NEG-NOTFOUND — ListRepositories for absent registry → 200 empty repositories[] (existence-hiding, no 404 leak)
REG-LSTTAGS-CRUD-OK — ListTags on own namespace → authorized read routes (200 tags[] or 404 repo-absent, not 401/403)
REG-LSTTAGS-NEG-BAD-TOKEN — ListTags with garbage page_token → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT

exec: if (pm.response.code !== 401) { pm.test('authenticated deny -> no resource-existence leak', () => pm.expect(JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.not.include('deny_reasons')); }

REG-DELTAG-NEG-MALFORMED-ID — DeleteTag with malformed registry id → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT ("invalid registry id")
REG-DEL-CRUD-OK — Delete registry → Operation → poll → Get 404 NOT_FOUND
